purpose: Female hand at resting position showing ring. Editorial fashion-photography aesthetic.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Editorial hand photography of elegant female hand at gentle angle showing {ring_descriptor} on ring finger, natural well-groomed nude or rose nail polish, hand positioned to catch soft window light creating beautiful highlights on ring stones, neutral cream background with subtle shadow play, real visible skin texture, shot on 100mm macro at f/4, no text, no watermark, no face {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: launch, grow. Source code in research corpus: T17. Saudi adaptation guidance: Saudi female jewelry typically shows hands with subtle henna for bridal context. Default no henna for everyday, optional subtle pattern for bridal collections. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per month. Compliance level: elevated (face-free).
